content_en:
part of it is the hip. The best way to eat rabbit meat is by roasting it. Rabbit meat constipates, produces urine, as a diuretic, and dissolves stones. Eating the rabbit's head benefits against convulsive shaking.

In the Sahihain it is narrated that Abu Qatadah said that the Companions were once with the Messenger of Allah b during an Umrah trip and that he hunted a zebra and the Prophet b told them to eat it. They were assuming the state of Ihram then, unlike Abu Qatadah.

Tbn Majah In addition narrated that Jabir 'a <iii * said, "During the battle of Khaibar, we ate horsemeat and zebra meat."

Zebra meat is hot and dry, nutritious and produces thick, bilious blood. Its fat is beneficial when mixed with Qust oil to treat toothache and flatulence that weakens the kidneys. Further, when its grease is applied on spots, it will heal them.

In general, all types of wild-game meat produce thick, bilious blood. In addition, the best type of wildgame meat is gazelle then rabbit meat.

The meat of animal fetuses is not preferred because the blood is still trapped in it. However, it is still

allowed, for the Prophet s, said:

"Slaughtering the fetus is included in slaughtering its mother."

The scholars of Iraq do not allow eating fetus's meat except if one kills it before it dies. They altered the meaning of the last Hadith saying that the fetus should be slaughtered as its mother was slaughtered according to the Hadith, as they claimed.

However, this claim is false. The Hadith states that the Prophet s& was asked, "O Messenger of Allah b . We slaughter a sheep and sometimes find a fetus still in its womb, should we eat it?" The Prophet b, said, "Eat it if you wish, because slaughtering it is included in slaughtering its mother."

In addition, when one studies this matter further, his analysis will In addition demonstrate that it is allowed to eat animal fetuses. The fetus is still a part of the mother, and since slaughtering the mother allows us to eat all of its parts, then the fetus should be included, as well. This is the meaning that the Prophet b meant when he said:

"Slaughtering it is included in slaughtering its mother."

—— The Prophetic Medicine

If the authentic Sunnah had not specifically allowed eating the fetus, the correct mind would still guide us that it is allowed.

Eating Dried (Jerked) Meat

It the Sunan it is narrated that Thawban said, "I slaughtered a sheep for the Messenger of Allah b while we were traveling, and he said to me:

I kept feeding the Prophet as from its meat until we reached Al-Medina."

Dried meat is better than old meat and strengthens the body, although it causes skin rashes sometimes, a side effect that could be neutralized with cold, humid spices. In addition, jerked meat is favorable for hot conditions. Old meat is hot and dry, favorable for hot conditions and the best type of this meat is that which is fat and wet. Finally, old meat constipates unless cooked in milk and grease. Fowl meat

"And with the flesh of fowls that they desire." (56:21) 590

Some types of fowl meats are allowed and some are prohibited. The prohibited types include the birds that have claws, such as the falcon, hawk and peregrine, and those that eat carrion, such as the eagle, vulture, stork, magpie, spotted and black crows. In addition, this list includes the birds that we are not allowed to kill, such as the hoopoe and the shrike, and some of the birds that we are allowed to kill, such as kite and crow.

There are many types of fowl that are allowed, such as chicken meat. In the Sahihain it is narrated by

Abu Musa that the Prophet “ ate chicken meat. Chicken Meat

Chicken meat is hot and dry in the first degree and it is easy on the stomach and digests quickly. Chicken meat strengthens the mind and increases the production of semen. It a so makes the voice softer, the mind stronger and produces healthy blood. It was said that eating chicken meat on a regular basis causes gout, but this is not confirmed by fact.

The cock' meat, on the other hand, is hotter and less wet. The meat of old cocks helps against constipation, asthma and thick flatulence when cooked with safflower, canella and chabt (Shibit). The castrated cock' meat is nutritious and easy to digest. Pullet meat is easy to digest and mild on the stomach and produces

mild blood. Francolin Meat

Francolin meat is hot and dry in the second degree, soft and light, easy to digest and produces mild blood. Eating this type of meat In addition strengthens the

This type of meat produces good blood and is easily digested.

Goose meat is hot and dry and is not healthy if eaten on a regular basis, and it does not produce extensive excrement.

Duck meat is hot and wet, and it is not suitable for the stomach, difficult to digest and produces excessive excrements.

Bustard meat is hot and dry, heavy on the stomach but good for those who perform sports activities and for

hard workers. Crane Meat

This type of meat is dry and light. It produces bilious blood, and it is good for hard workers. It is better to eat the crane's meat one or two days after it is slaughtered.

Bird and Lark Meat

An-Nas'ay narrated in his Sunnan that Abdullah bin Umar said that the Prophet b said:

- "No person kills a bird and a larger animal without justification, but will be asked about it on the Day of Resurrection. He was asked, 'O0 Messenger of Allah! When is it justified?’ He said, "You slaughter it and eat it, but do not cut its head and discard its body (i.e. for sport only).

In addition, An-Nas'ay narrated that the

"Whoever kills a bird for fun, the bird will complain to Allah, 'O0 my Lord, Such and such person killed me for fun, not for a useful purpose."

Bird meat is hot and dry, constipates and stimulates semen production. Bird meat soup constipates

—— The Prophetic Medicine

and helps the joints. If one eats birds’ brain with ginger and onion, it excites the sexual desire. The mixtures that bird's produce is not favorable.

Pigeon meat is hot and wet, although the meat of wild pigeons is less wet. The meat of pigeon chicks is more humid, especially the chicks of domesticated pigeons. Young pigeons are less meaty but a better food. The meat of male pigeons is a good cure for numbness, narcosis, apoplexy and convulsive shaking or trembles. Pigeon chick meat is favorable for the sexual drive and the kidneys and produces more blood.

This type of meat is dry and causes black bile and constipation. It is not a good food, except that it helps eure dropsy.

Quail meat is hot and dry and helps the joints. It harms the hot kidney unless it is taken with vinegar and coriander. Eating the meat of the quails that live in filthy areas should be avoided.

Fowl meats are all more casily digested than cattle

meat. The parts of the birds that are the most easily digested are the necks and the wings. In addition, the brains of the fowls are a better food than cattle brains,

In the Sahihain it is narrated that Abdullah bin Abi Awfa said, "We went to seven battles with the Messenger of Allah during which we used to eat locust." The Musnad In addition narrated that the Messenger of Allah said:

"We were allowed two types of dead animals and two bloods: fish and locust; liver and spleen."

This Hadith is In addition related from Ibn ‘Umar .

Locust meat is hot and dry and not very nutritious. In addition, eating locust meat regularly makes the body thin, emaciated. The smoke of burnt locust helps in cases of dysuria (impaired ability to pass urine), especially for women, and is favorable for hemorrhoids. Eating fat wingless locust roasted is a good cure for scorpion stings. In addition, locust meat is not favorable for those suffering from epilepsy and produces septic mixtures in the stomach.

There is a difference on allowing eating locust when it is dead, where the majority of the scholars except Malik allow it. Yet, there is no difference that it is

-———— The Prophetic Medicine

allowed if the locust died because of a reason, such as being burnt or pressed.

It is not good for the health to eat meat on a regular basis because it causes bloody sanguincous illnesses and various types of allergies, Hippocrates once said, "Do not turn your stomachs to a graveyard for animals."

2. Laban (Milk) Allah said: fo eee fe or st te < ok we Leg I) Day WEL ease 05455 "And verily, in the cattle, there is a lesson for you. We give you to drink of that which is in their

bellies, from between excretions and blood, pure milk; palatable to the drinkers." (16:66)

In addition Allah said, while describing Paradise:

wer High alts “pglkt de} gaat Jey

5S aches bakes iB oe tae Gan Lob

"In it are rivers of water the taste and smell of which are not changed, rivers of milk of which the taste never changes." (47:15)

In the Sunan it is In addition narrated:

\"Whoever Allah gives some type of food, let him supplicate. 'O Allah! Bless it for us and grant us what is better.’ Whoever Allah grants some Laban, let him say. 'O Allah! Bless it for us and grant us more of it,' for I do not know of a more complete food or drink than milk."

Although milk is a simple type of food, it is very natural to the body as it contains three major substances: cheese, fat and water. Cheese is cold and wet and provides good nutrition. The fat contained in the milk is

—— The Prophetic Medicine

mild regarding warmth and wetness, and it very beneficial for healthy bodies.

The water part contained in milk is hot and wet, and it softens the stomach and provides the body with beneficial moistures. Laban in general is mild regarding warmth and wetness, although there are other opinions in this regard.

Milk is best when it has just been milked, and its value decreases by the passage of time thereafter. When it is freshly milked, milk is less cold and more humid. Sour milk is the opposite. In addition, milk is better forty days after the animal has given birth. The best type of milk is the most white in color, as it has a good scent, delicious taste, mildly sweet, less fat and light consistency. It is In addition best when young healthy animals are milked, especially those that have less meat and which graze in healthy grazing lands. Milk is good and produces red blood, brings wetness to the body and is In addition a nutritious food. In addition, milk helps relieve depression, obsession and black bile ailments. When milk is drunk with honey, it will help cleanse the insides of septic materials. Drinking milk with sugar makes the color of the skin fairer. Milk helps the body regain its strength after sexual intercourse and is In addition favorable for the chest, the lungs and for those suffering from tuberculosis,
content_id:
bagian dari itu adalah pinggul. Cara terbaik memasak daging kelinci adalah dengan memanggang. Daging kelinci menyebabkan sembelit, melancarkan buang air kecil, bersifat diuretik, dan melarutkan batu. Memakan kepala kelinci bermanfaat untuk mengatasi kejang-kejang.

Dalam Sahihain diriwayatkan bahwa Abu Qatadah berkata bahwa para Sahabat pernah bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam perjalanan Umrah, lalu beliau berburu zebra dan Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan mereka untuk memakannya. Mereka saat itu sedang dalam keadaan ihram, berbeda dengan Abu Qatadah.

Ibnu Majah juga meriwayatkan bahwa Jabir ؓ berkata, "Dalam perang Khaibar, kami memakan daging kuda dan daging zebra."

Daging zebra bersifat panas dan kering, bergizi dan menghasilkan darah kental yang bersifat empedu. Lemaknya bermanfaat bila dicampur dengan minyak Qust untuk mengobati sakit gigi dan perut kembung yang melemahkan ginjal. Selain itu, bila lemaknya dioleskan pada bintik-bintik, akan menyembuhkannya.

Secara umum, semua jenis daging hewan buruan menghasilkan darah kental yang bersifat empedu. Selain itu, jenis daging buruan yang terbaik adalah daging rusa kemudian daging kelinci.

Daging janin hewan tidak dianjurkan karena darah masih terperangkap di dalamnya. Namun, hal itu tetap

dibolehkan, karena Nabi ﷺ bersabda:

"Penyembelihan janin termasuk dalam penyembelihan induknya."

Para ulama Irak tidak membolehkan memakan daging janin kecuali jika disembelih sebelum mati. Mereka mengubah makna hadith tersebut dengan menyatakan bahwa janin harus disembelih sebagaimana induknya disembelih berdasarkan hadith tersebut, menurut klaim mereka.

Namun, klaim ini tidak benar. Hadith menyatakan bahwa Nabi ﷺ pernah ditanya, "Wahai Rasulullah ﷺ, kami menyembelih seekor kambing dan terkadang mendapati janin masih dalam rahimnya, apakah kami boleh memakannya?" Nabi ﷺ bersabda, "Makanlah jika kamu mau, karena penyembelihannya termasuk dalam penyembelihan induknya."

Selain itu, bila seseorang mengkaji masalah ini lebih jauh, analisisnya juga akan menunjukkan bahwa memakan janin hewan adalah boleh. Janin masih merupakan bagian dari induknya, dan karena penyembelihan induk membolehkan kita memakan semua bagiannya, maka janin pun termasuk di dalamnya. Inilah makna yang dimaksud Nabi ﷺ ketika beliau bersabda:

"Penyembelihannya termasuk dalam penyembelihan induknya."

—— Thibbun Nabawi

Seandainya Sunnah yang shahih tidak secara khusus membolehkan memakan janin, akal yang benar pun akan tetap menunjukkan bahwa hal itu dibolehkan.

Memakan Daging Kering (Dendeng)

Dalam Sunan diriwayatkan bahwa Tsauban berkata, "Aku menyembelih seekor kambing untuk Rasulullah ﷺ ketika kami sedang dalam perjalanan, dan beliau bersabda kepadaku:

Aku terus memberi makan Nabi ﷺ dari dagingnya hingga kami tiba di Madinah."

Daging kering lebih baik daripada daging tua dan memperkuat tubuh, meskipun terkadang menyebabkan ruam kulit, efek samping yang dapat dinetralisir dengan rempah-rempah dingin dan lembab. Selain itu, daging kering baik untuk kondisi panas. Daging tua bersifat panas dan kering, baik untuk kondisi panas dan jenis terbaik adalah yang berlemak dan basah. Akhirnya, daging tua menyebabkan sembelit kecuali dimasak dalam susu dan lemak. Daging Unggas

"Dan daging burung dari apa yang mereka inginkan." (56:21)

Beberapa jenis daging unggas halal dan sebagian lagi haram. Jenis yang diharamkan meliputi burung yang memiliki cakar, seperti elang, rajawali dan falkon, dan yang memakan bangkai, seperti elang botak, burung nasar, bangau, burung murai, burung gagak berbintik dan hitam. Selain itu, daftar ini mencakup burung yang tidak boleh kita bunuh, seperti burung hudhud dan cekakak, dan sebagian burung yang boleh kita bunuh, seperti layang-layang dan gagak.

Ada banyak jenis unggas yang halal, seperti daging ayam. Dalam Sahihain diriwayatkan oleh Abu Musa bahwa Nabi ﷺ memakan daging ayam. Daging Ayam

Daging ayam bersifat panas dan kering pada tingkat pertama, mudah dicerna lambung dan cepat dicerna. Daging ayam memperkuat akal dan meningkatkan produksi sperma. Ia juga melembutkan suara, memperkuat akal dan menghasilkan darah yang sehat. Dikatakan bahwa memakan daging ayam secara teratur menyebabkan penyakit asam urat, namun hal ini tidak dikonfirmasi oleh fakta.

Daging ayam jantan, di sisi lain, lebih panas dan kurang basah. Daging ayam jantan tua membantu mengatasi sembelit, asma dan perut kembung yang kental bila dimasak dengan safflower, kayu manis dan syabt (Syibith). Daging ayam jantan yang dikebiri bergizi dan mudah dicerna. Daging ayam betina muda mudah dicerna dan ringan di lambung serta menghasilkan darah yang ringan. Daging Francolin

Daging francolin bersifat panas dan kering pada tingkat kedua, lembut dan ringan, mudah dicerna dan menghasilkan darah yang ringan. Memakan jenis daging ini juga memperkuat

Jenis daging ini menghasilkan darah yang baik dan mudah dicerna.

Daging angsa bersifat panas dan kering dan tidak menyehatkan bila dimakan secara teratur, serta tidak menghasilkan kotoran yang banyak.

Daging bebek bersifat panas dan basah, tidak cocok untuk lambung, sulit dicerna dan menghasilkan kotoran yang berlebihan.

Daging bustard bersifat panas dan kering, berat di lambung namun baik bagi mereka yang berolahraga dan

pekerja keras. Daging Bangau

Jenis daging ini bersifat kering dan ringan. Ia menghasilkan darah yang bersifat empedu dan baik bagi pekerja keras. Lebih baik memakan daging bangau satu atau dua hari setelah disembelih.

Daging Burung dan Burung Pipit

An-Nasa'i meriwayatkan dalam Sunannya bahwa Abdullah bin Umar berkata bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda:

"Tidaklah seseorang membunuh seekor burung dan hewan yang lebih besar tanpa alasan yang benar, melainkan akan ditanya tentang hal itu pada hari Kiamat." Beliau ditanya, "Wahai Rasulullah! Kapan hal itu dibenarkan?" Beliau bersabda, "Kamu menyembelihnya dan memakannya, tetapi jangan memotong kepalanya dan membuang tubuhnya (yakni hanya untuk bersenang-senang)."

An-Nasa'i juga meriwayatkan bahwa

"Barangsiapa membunuh seekor burung untuk bersenang-senang, burung itu akan mengadu kepada Allah, 'Wahai Rabbku, si fulan membunuhku untuk bersenang-senang, bukan untuk tujuan yang bermanfaat.'"

Daging burung bersifat panas dan kering, menyebabkan sembelit dan merangsang produksi sperma. Sup daging burung menyebabkan sembelit

—— Thibbun Nabawi

dan membantu persendian. Jika seseorang memakan otak burung dengan jahe dan bawang, hal itu membangkitkan hasrat seksual. Campuran yang dihasilkan burung tidak baik bagi kesehatan.

Daging merpati bersifat panas dan basah, meskipun daging merpati liar kurang basah. Daging anak merpati lebih lembab, terutama anak merpati peliharaan. Merpati muda kurang berdaging tetapi makanan yang lebih baik. Daging merpati jantan adalah obat yang baik untuk mati rasa, narkosis, apopleksi dan kejang-kejang atau gemetar. Daging anak merpati baik untuk dorongan seksual dan ginjal serta menghasilkan lebih banyak darah.

Jenis daging ini bersifat kering dan menyebabkan empedu hitam dan sembelit. Ini bukan makanan yang baik, kecuali bahwa ia membantu mengobati penyakit busung air.

Daging puyuh bersifat panas dan kering serta membantu persendian. Ia berbahaya bagi ginjal yang panas kecuali dimakan dengan cuka dan ketumbar. Memakan daging puyuh yang hidup di daerah kotor harus dihindari.

Daging unggas semuanya lebih mudah dicerna daripada daging sapi. Bagian burung yang paling mudah dicerna adalah leher dan sayap. Selain itu, otak unggas adalah makanan yang lebih baik daripada otak sapi.

Dalam Sahihain diriwayatkan bahwa Abdullah bin Abi Awfa berkata, "Kami pergi berperang tujuh kali bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di mana kami biasa memakan belalang." Musnad juga meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda:

"Dihalalkan bagi kami dua bangkai dan dua darah: ikan dan belalang; hati dan limpa."

Hadith ini juga diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar ؓ.

Daging belalang bersifat panas dan kering dan tidak terlalu bergizi. Selain itu, memakan daging belalang secara teratur membuat tubuh menjadi kurus dan kering. Asap belalang yang dibakar membantu dalam kasus disuria (gangguan kemampuan buang air kecil), terutama bagi wanita, dan baik untuk wasir. Memakan belalang betina tak bersayap yang dipanggang adalah obat yang baik untuk sengatan kalajengking. Selain itu, daging belalang tidak baik bagi penderita epilepsi dan menghasilkan campuran yang membusuk di lambung.

Terdapat perbedaan pendapat mengenai kebolehan memakan belalang yang mati, di mana mayoritas ulama kecuali Malik membolehkannya. Namun, tidak ada perbedaan bahwa hal itu

—— Thibbun Nabawi

dibolehkan jika belalang mati karena suatu sebab, seperti terbakar atau terinjak.

Tidak baik bagi kesehatan untuk memakan daging secara teratur karena menyebabkan penyakit sanguineous berdarah dan berbagai jenis alergi. Hippocrates pernah berkata, "Jangan jadikan perut kalian sebagai kuburan bagi hewan."

2. Laban (Susu) Allah berfirman: "Dan sesungguhnya pada hewan ternak itu benar-benar terdapat pelajaran bagi kamu. Kami memberi kamu minum dari apa yang ada di dalam perutnya

perut, dari antara kotoran dan darah, susu murni; yang lezat bagi para peminumnya." (16:66)

Allah juga berfirman, ketika menggambarkan Surga:

wer High alts "pglkt de} gaat Jey

"Di dalamnya terdapat sungai-sungai air yang rasa dan baunya tidak berubah, sungai-sungai susu yang rasanya tidak pernah berubah." (47:15)

Dalam Sunan juga diriwayatkan:

"Barangsiapa yang Allah beri suatu jenis makanan, hendaklah ia berdoa: 'Ya Allah! Berkahilah makanan ini bagi kami dan anugerahkan kepada kami yang lebih baik darinya.' Barangsiapa yang Allah anugerahi Laban, hendaklah ia berkata: 'Ya Allah! Berkahilah ia bagi kami dan anugerahkan kepada kami lebih banyak lagi darinya,' karena aku tidak mengetahui makanan atau minuman yang lebih sempurna daripada susu."

Meskipun susu adalah jenis makanan yang sederhana, ia sangat alami bagi tubuh karena mengandung tiga zat utama: keju, lemak, dan air. Keju bersifat dingin dan lembap serta memberikan gizi yang baik. Lemak yang terkandung dalam susu bersifat

—— Thibbun Nabawi

ringan dalam hal kehangatan dan kelembapan, serta sangat bermanfaat bagi tubuh yang sehat.

Bagian air yang terkandung dalam susu bersifat panas dan lembap, melembutkan lambung serta memberikan kelembapan yang bermanfaat bagi tubuh. Laban secara umum bersifat ringan dalam hal kehangatan dan kelembapan, meskipun ada pendapat lain dalam hal ini.

Susu paling baik dikonsumsi saat baru diperah, dan nilainya berkurang seiring berjalannya waktu. Ketika baru diperah, susu lebih kurang dingin dan lebih lembap. Susu asam bersifat sebaliknya. Selain itu, susu lebih baik empat puluh hari setelah hewan melahirkan. Jenis susu terbaik adalah yang paling putih warnanya, memiliki aroma yang baik, rasanya lezat, sedikit manis, kandungan lemaknya sedikit, dan teksturnya ringan. Susu juga paling baik bila berasal dari hewan muda yang sehat, terutama yang dagingnya sedikit dan merumput di padang rumput yang baik. Susu baik dan menghasilkan darah merah, memberikan kelembapan bagi tubuh, dan juga merupakan makanan bergizi. Selain itu, susu membantu meredakan depresi, was-was, dan penyakit yang disebabkan oleh empedu hitam. Apabila susu diminum bersama madu, ia akan membantu membersihkan bagian dalam tubuh dari materi-materi septik. Meminum susu bersama gula dapat mencerahkan warna kulit. Susu membantu tubuh memulihkan kekuatannya setelah hubungan intim dan juga baik untuk dada, paru-paru, serta bagi mereka yang menderita tuberkulosis,
content_ar:
part of it is the hip. The best way to eat rabbit meat is by roasting it. Rabbit meat constipates, produces urine, as a diuretic, and dissolves stones. Eating the rabbit's head benefits against convulsive shaking.

In the Sahihain it is narrated that Abu Qatadah said that the الصحابة were once with رسول الله ﷺ b during an Umrah trip and that he hunted a zebra and النبي ﷺ b told them to eat it. They were assuming the state of Ihram then, unlike Abu Qatadah.

Tbn Majah In addition narrated that Jabir 'a <iii * said, "During the battle of Khaibar, we ate horsemeat and zebra meat."

Zebra meat is hot and dry, nutritious and produces thick, bilious blood. Its fat is beneficial when mixed with Qust oil to treat toothache and flatulence that weakens the kidneys. Further, when its grease is applied on spots, it will heal them.

In general, all types of wild-game meat produce thick, bilious blood. In addition, the best type of wildgame meat is gazelle then rabbit meat.

The meat of animal fetuses is not preferred because the blood is still trapped in it. However, it is still

allowed, for النبي ﷺ s, said:

"Slaughtering the fetus is included in slaughtering its mother."

The scholars of Iraq do not allow eating fetus's meat except if one kills it before it dies. They altered the meaning of the last الحديث saying that the fetus should be slaughtered as its mother was slaughtered according to the الحديث, as they claimed.

However, this claim is false. The الحديث states that النبي ﷺ s& was asked, "O رسول الله ﷺ b . We slaughter a sheep and sometimes find a fetus still in its womb, should we eat it?" النبي ﷺ b, said, "Eat it if you wish, because slaughtering it is included in slaughtering its mother."

In addition, when one studies this matter further, his analysis will In addition demonstrate that it is allowed to eat animal fetuses. The fetus is still a part of the mother, and since slaughtering the mother allows us to eat all of its parts, then the fetus should be included, as well. This is the meaning that النبي ﷺ b meant when he said:

"Slaughtering it is included in slaughtering its mother."

—— The Prophetic Medicine

If the authentic السنة النبوية had not specifically allowed eating the fetus, the correct mind would still guide us that it is allowed.

Eating Dried (Jerked) Meat

It the Sunan it is narrated that Thawban said, "I slaughtered a sheep for رسول الله ﷺ b while we were traveling, and he said to me:

I kept feeding النبي ﷺ as from its meat until we reached Al-Medina."

Dried meat is better than old meat and strengthens the body, although it causes skin rashes sometimes, a side effect that could be neutralized with cold, humid spices. In addition, jerked meat is favorable for hot conditions. Old meat is hot and dry, favorable for hot conditions and the best type of this meat is that which is fat and wet. Finally, old meat constipates unless cooked in milk and grease. Fowl meat

"And with the flesh of fowls that they desire." (56:21) 590

Some types of fowl meats are allowed and some are prohibited. The prohibited types include the birds that have claws, such as the falcon, hawk and peregrine, and those that eat carrion, such as the eagle, vulture, stork, magpie, spotted and black crows. In addition, this list includes the birds that we are not allowed to kill, such as the hoopoe and the shrike, and some of the birds that we are allowed to kill, such as kite and crow.

There are many types of fowl that are allowed, such as chicken meat. In the Sahihain it is narrated by

Abu Musa that النبي ﷺ “ ate chicken meat. Chicken Meat

Chicken meat is hot and dry in the first degree and it is easy on the stomach and digests quickly. Chicken meat strengthens the mind and increases the production of semen. It a so makes the voice softer, the mind stronger and produces healthy blood. It was said that eating chicken meat on a regular basis causes gout, but this is not confirmed by fact.

The cock' meat, on the other hand, is hotter and less wet. The meat of old cocks helps against constipation, asthma and thick flatulence when cooked with safflower, canella and chabt (Shibit). The castrated cock' meat is nutritious and easy to digest. Pullet meat is easy to digest and mild on the stomach and produces

mild blood. Francolin Meat

Francolin meat is hot and dry in the second degree, soft and light, easy to digest and produces mild blood. Eating this type of meat In addition strengthens the

This type of meat produces good blood and is easily digested.

Goose meat is hot and dry and is not healthy if eaten on a regular basis, and it does not produce extensive excrement.

Duck meat is hot and wet, and it is not suitable for the stomach, difficult to digest and produces excessive excrements.

Bustard meat is hot and dry, heavy on the stomach but good for those who perform sports activities and for

hard workers. Crane Meat

This type of meat is dry and light. It produces bilious blood, and it is good for hard workers. It is better to eat the crane's meat one or two days after it is slaughtered.

Bird and Lark Meat

An-Nas'ay narrated in his Sunnan that Abdullah bin Umar said that النبي ﷺ b said:

- "No person kills a bird and a larger animal without justification, but will be asked about it on the Day of Resurrection. He was asked, 'O0 رسول الله ﷺ! When is it justified?’ He said, "You slaughter it and eat it, but do not cut its head and discard its body (i.e. for sport only).

In addition, An-Nas'ay narrated that the

"Whoever kills a bird for fun, the bird will complain to الله, 'O0 my Lord, Such and such person killed me for fun, not for a useful purpose."

Bird meat is hot and dry, constipates and stimulates semen production. Bird meat soup constipates

—— The Prophetic Medicine

and helps the joints. If one eats birds’ brain with ginger and onion, it excites the sexual desire. The mixtures that bird's produce is not favorable.

Pigeon meat is hot and wet, although the meat of wild pigeons is less wet. The meat of pigeon chicks is more humid, especially the chicks of domesticated pigeons. Young pigeons are less meaty but a better food. The meat of male pigeons is a good cure for numbness, narcosis, apoplexy and convulsive shaking or trembles. Pigeon chick meat is favorable for the sexual drive and the kidneys and produces more blood.

This type of meat is dry and causes black bile and constipation. It is not a good food, except that it helps eure dropsy.

Quail meat is hot and dry and helps the joints. It harms the hot kidney unless it is taken with vinegar and coriander. Eating the meat of the quails that live in filthy areas should be avoided.

Fowl meats are all more casily digested than cattle

meat. The parts of the birds that are the most easily digested are the necks and the wings. In addition, the brains of the fowls are a better food than cattle brains,

In the Sahihain it is narrated that Abdullah bin Abi Awfa said, "We went to seven battles with رسول الله ﷺ during which we used to eat locust." The Musnad In addition narrated that رسول الله ﷺ said:

"We were allowed two types of dead animals and two bloods: fish and locust; liver and spleen."

This الحديث is In addition related from Ibn ‘Umar .

Locust meat is hot and dry and not very nutritious. In addition, eating locust meat regularly makes the body thin, emaciated. The smoke of burnt locust helps in cases of dysuria (impaired ability to pass urine), especially for women, and is favorable for hemorrhoids. Eating fat wingless locust roasted is a good cure for scorpion stings. In addition, locust meat is not favorable for those suffering from epilepsy and produces septic mixtures in the stomach.

There is a difference on allowing eating locust when it is dead, where the majority of the scholars except Malik allow it. Yet, there is no difference that it is

-———— The Prophetic Medicine

allowed if the locust died because of a reason, such as being burnt or pressed.

It is not good for the health to eat meat on a regular basis because it causes bloody sanguincous illnesses and various types of allergies, Hippocrates once said, "Do not turn your stomachs to a graveyard for animals."

2. Laban (Milk) الله said: fo eee fe or st te < ok we Leg I) Day WEL ease 05455 "And verily, in the cattle, there is a lesson for you. We give you to drink of that which is in their

bellies, from between excretions and blood, pure milk; palatable to the drinkers." (16:66)

In addition الله said, while describing Paradise:

"In it are rivers of water the taste and smell of which are not changed, rivers of milk of which the taste never changes." (47:15)

In the Sunan it is In addition narrated:

\"Whoever الله gives some type of food, let him supplicate. 'O الله! Bless it for us and grant us what is better.’ Whoever الله grants some Laban, let him say. 'O الله! Bless it for us and grant us more of it,' for I do not know of a more complete food or drink than milk."

Although milk is a simple type of food, it is very natural to the body as it contains three major substances: cheese, fat and water. Cheese is cold and wet and provides good nutrition. The fat contained in the milk is

—— The Prophetic Medicine

mild regarding warmth and wetness, and it very beneficial for healthy bodies.

The water part contained in milk is hot and wet, and it softens the stomach and provides the body with beneficial moistures. Laban in general is mild regarding warmth and wetness, although there are other opinions in this regard.

Milk is best when it has just been milked, and its value decreases by the passage of time thereafter. When it is freshly milked, milk is less cold and more humid. Sour milk is the opposite. In addition, milk is better forty days after the animal has given birth. The best type of milk is the most white in color, as it has a good scent, delicious taste, mildly sweet, less fat and light consistency. It is In addition best when young healthy animals are milked, especially those that have less meat and which graze in healthy grazing lands. Milk is good and produces red blood, brings wetness to the body and is In addition a nutritious food. In addition, milk helps relieve depression, obsession and black bile ailments. When milk is drunk with honey, it will help cleanse the insides of septic materials. Drinking milk with sugar makes the color of the skin fairer. Milk helps the body regain its strength after sexual intercourse and is In addition favorable for the chest, the lungs and for those suffering from tuberculosis,
